name: Farfel Marshmallow Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter on low heat.
2. Add marshmallows and stir until melted. Remove from heat.
3. Chop nuts finely using a food processor with quick on/off turns.
4. Add half the chopped nuts to the marshmallows. Set aside remaining nuts for garnish.
5. Stir in matzo farfel and cinnamon, mixing well.
6. Spread mixture evenly in a buttered 9" x 13" pan.
7. Wet hands and pat mixture down evenly.
8. Melt chocolate (microwave 2 minutes on HIGH for about 1 lb).
9. Drizzle melted chocolate over the mixture.
10. Sprinkle reserved nuts on top.
11. Allow to cool until chocolate is set.
12. Cut into squares. Makes about 4 dozen squares.
